data.title: US-Iran Talks Fuel Oil Rally: Here Are 3 Energy ETFs In The Radar
data.description: Oil prices rise on US-Iran diplomacy and trade war lull, boosting energy ETFs. Companies like ExxonMobil and Chevron benefit. OPEC lowers demand forecast.

data.title: Banking On Less: Truist Trims Price Forecasts For JPMorgan, Wells Fargo After Mixed Signals
data.description: Truist Securities analysts slashed price forecasts for JPMorgan and Wells Fargo following their first-quarter earnings release.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Analyst Sees Demand For Strategic Advice, Although Tariff Talks May Cause Uncertainty, Market Swings
data.description: Morgan Stanley's Q1 2025 results show a 17% revenue increase and higher EPS, surpassing market expectations despite credit loss provision rise.

data.title: What's Going On With Longevity Health Shares Monday?
data.description: Longevity announced it entered into a merger agreement with 20/20 BioLabs.

data.title: CryptoPunk, Tax Flunk: NFT Seller Pleads Guilty In $13M Fraud Case
data.description: A man, who pleaded guilty to hiding millions from the IRS, faces six years in prison since cryptocurrency reporting is mandatory.
